hero.tagline: Cinematographic editor focused on rhythm, energy, and striking narrative.

about.title: Cuts that
about.p1: I'm Yuri Coelho, a beginner video editor focusing on rhythm, color, and building tension between silence and impact. My work combines cinematic storytelling with the dynamic energy of digital content, especially aimed at YouTube.
about.p2: I edit gameplays and YouTube Shorts, creating engaging cuts that hold the viewer's attention from start to finish. I strive to transform each video into a fluid and impactful experience, balancing entertainment, timing, and intensity to maximize retention and engagement.

skills.title: Made for
skills.tagline: Four disciplines, one signature. Every project is an exercise in rhythm.

social.title: Follow the
social.tagline: Connect, send a message and let's make something memorable.

briefing.title: Start your
briefing.tagline: Fill in the details and receive a personalized quote in your email.

fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about the style and objective of the video...
fields.rawFilesUrlPlaceholder: Ex: Google Drive or Dropbox link
fields.rawFilesUrlHint: We prioritize Google Drive for quality. Please set the link to 'Public'. If using YouTube, ensure it is 'Unlisted' and the link is correct.

help.videoTitle: Give your project a name to make it easier for us to organize.
help.description: Provide as much detail as possible about the style and objective of the video.
help.rawMinutes: Total original recording time helps estimate the volume of work.
help.targetDuration: This defines the pace and structure of the final edit.
help.otherContact: Optional, but helps if we need faster contact.
